name: palette
description: Connect your AI assistant to Palette — query clusters, diagnose issues, manage infrastructure using natural language.

host.title: Palette host
host.description: Required to connect. Your Palette tenant URL, e.g. example.spectrocloud.com

api_key.title: Palette API key
api_key.description: Required unless using an auth token. Create under User Menu > My API Keys.

auth_token.title: Palette auth token
auth_token.description: JWT alternative to an API key — set one, not both.

project_uid.title: Default project UID
project_uid.description: Optional. Scopes all calls to one project; omit for tenant-wide access.

ca_file.title: Custom CA file path
ca_file.description: Optional. CA bundle path for a self-hosted Palette behind a private CA.
